title: Mid-century sectional sofa
description: Three-seat sectional in charcoal linen. Lightly used, one scuff on the back-left leg. 94" × 36" × 32". You'll need two people and a truck.

title: Vintage steel road bike, 56cm
description: Classic lugged-steel road bike, 56cm frame (fits riders around 5'9" to 6'0"). Recently tuned, fresh bar tape, new brake pads.

title: Brass arc floor lamp
description: Heavy marble base, 76" arc. Takes a standard E26 bulb. Small patina on the arm, otherwise perfect.
